ValidationRule.description: INACTIVE. LAND loss-capture gate: Loss Reason required when a LAND Opp moves to a non-won closed stage (Closed Lost, Dead - No Decision, Dead - No Opportunity). Mirrors investor loss-reason pattern. Stage provisional (OQ-009). Activation by Nic.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'LAND', OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Lost'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Dead - No Decision'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Dead - No Opportunity') ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Loss_Reason__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Indica el Motivo de Perdida (Loss Reason) al cerrar una oportunidad LAND como perdida o dead. Esto genera el rastro de auditoria de perdidas.
